cleavage agent: incubating with trypsin (Promega, #V5111) (ratio of 1:50 W/W) overnight at 37 °C
enrichment method: affinity purification, thus overcoming potential intermolecular and intramolecular cysteine-related issues experienced in protein level BTA
fragmentation method: using higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) as the fragmentation method for MS/MS scans
instrument: ThermoFisher Scientific Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: Nano electrospray ion source was operated at 2.3 kV
labeling: multiplex iodoacetyl isobaric tandem mass tag (iodoTMT) labeling of sulfhydryl groups
reduction reagent: the addition of DTT in the final elution step selectively elutes persulfidated proteins
reduction concentration: adding 20 mM DTT in the dark
